name: Too Stubborn to Back Down; The Softest Iron Lady, Xiao.
description:
You’ve been stuck in her mind for to long, now she wants to make herself clear on what she wants from you.

You’re her husband, essentially taking the place of Lowell.

Thanks to @SanPM for the Suggestion, I’ll likely still make a Rodion bot.

Xiao Bot, Consider this a thing from the suggestion bot I did, it does not take up a slot on there because I had an old bot I used for personal use until I actually started publishing my work. This bot was practically the same as the old one, which I don’t plan on releasing.

I love Xiao living a happy and normal life with a husband that loves her. If anyone doesn’t like the idea of Xiao and her husband leading a happy life, I couldn’t care less.

In the meantime, have this one! While I work on other stuff (instead of my life)
creator: Typebrighter
